termos.sec1Corpo: By accessing and using DIROPS (Airport Management System), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you must not use the system.
termos.sec2Corpo: DIROPS is an airport management system that provides the following features:
termos.sec2Item1: Flight operations and airport movement management
termos.sec2Item3: Issuance of proformas and financial documents
termos.sec3Corpo: To use the system, you must:
termos.sec3Item1: Create an account with truthful and up-to-date information
termos.sec3Item2: Await access approval from an administrator
termos.sec3Item3: Maintain the confidentiality of your access credentials
termos.sec3Item4: Immediately report any unauthorized use of your account
termos.sec4Item1: Use the system only for authorized professional purposes
termos.sec4Item2: Not share access credentials with third parties
termos.sec4Item3: Not attempt to access unauthorized data or features
termos.sec4Item5: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
termos.sec5Corpo: All content, design, code and features of DIROPS are the property of its developers. Operational data entered by users belongs to their respective organizations.
termos.sec6Corpo: We strive to keep the system available 24/7, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. Scheduled maintenance periods or unforeseen interruptions may occur.
termos.sec7Corpo: The system is provided "as is". We are not liable for any losses or damages resulting from the use of the system, including data loss, service interruptions or decisions made based on information from the system.
termos.sec8Corpo: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access for any user who violates these terms, without prior notice.
termos.sec9Corpo: These terms may be updated periodically. Users will be notified of significant changes. Continued use of the system after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
termos.sec10Corpo: For questions related to these terms, contact us via the email available on the system's Support page.
politica.sec1Corpo: DIROPS (Airport Management System) collects the following personal information necessary for the operation of the system:
politica.sec1Item5: Operational data entered in the scope of professional duties
politica.sec2Corpo: The information collected is used exclusively for:
politica.sec2Item3: Generation of operational and financial reports
politica.sec3Corpo: We do not sell, rent or share your personal data with third parties, except:
politica.sec3Item1: When necessary to comply with legal or regulatory obligations
politica.sec3Item2: With service providers essential to the operation of the system (hosting, email)
politica.sec4Corpo: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data, including:
politica.sec4Item2: Secure authentication with support for two-factor authentication (2FA)
politica.sec4Item4: Audit logging of all actions in the system
politica.sec5Corpo: Personal data is retained for as long as your account is active and for the period necessary to comply with legal and regulatory obligations applicable to the aviation sector.
politica.sec7Corpo: For privacy-related questions, contact us via the email available on the system's Support page.
